name: König | Bodyguard
description:
You want to go out for your birthday, but König won't let you.

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: *.☽ .* :☆ﾟ. ───

This bot is inspired from a bot I talked to on c.ai, but I don't remember the username since I deleted the app a while ago. Self indulgent bot, honestly. It's platonic, but you can choose to go down the romantic/sexual route, just be 18+!
